message:
🐛 Fix SSE streaming timeouts for operators/helm/subscriptions (#979)

- Increase operatorPerClusterTimeout from 60s to 180s (vllm-d takes ~100s
  for 1360 CSVs, pok-prod-sa ~100s for 1957 CSVs)
- Increase operatorRestOverallTimeout from 120s to 200s
- Increase SSE_TIMEOUT from 60s to 240s in frontend sseClient.ts
- Send cluster_data events for ALL clusters (including empty ones) so
  the frontend sees progress immediately instead of waiting for slow
  clusters to finish

Verified: 7 clusters stream progressively — small clusters in 1-2s,
large OLM clusters (vllm-d: 1360, pok-prod-sa: 1957, platform-eval: 1908)
in 97-117s. Total: 5,225 operators.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
